comments.comment: Ethylene glycol is used as a heat medium in the facility in a quantity greater than 10 tonnes, exceeding the 10 tonne threshhold of incidentally manufactured, processed, or otherwise used as a by-product. As per NPRI, the term "by-product" refers to the quantity of an NPRI Part 1 substance that is incidentally manufactured, processed or other used at the facility at any concentration, and released to the environment or disposed of.
